title: CPO optical engine manufacturing considerations and go to market
title_translation: CPO光引擎的制造考量与市场化

paragraphs.source: CPO has not yet been manufactured at quantities commensurate with wide-scale adoption. Broadcom was the only vendor to have shipped production systems featuring CPO, with its Bailly and Humboldt switches, but now Nvidia is joining the fray. These have been shipped at very low volumes. CPO introduces many new manufacturing processes and significant manufacturability challenges. Understandably, given the immaturity of the supply chain and lack of data on reliability, customers are also reluctant to take the plunge in adopting the technology.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: CPO has not yet been manufactured at quantities commensurate with wide-scale adoption. Broadcom was the only vendor to have shipped production systems featuring CPO, with its Bailly and Humboldt switches, but now Nvidia is joining the fray. These have been shipped at very low volumes. CPO introduces many new manufacturing processes and significant manufacturability challenges. Understandably, given the immaturity of the supply chain and lack of data on reliability, customers are also reluctant to take the plunge in adopting the technology.

Broadcom was the only vendor to have shipped production systems featuring CPO, with its Bailly and Humboldt switches, but now Nvidia is joining the fray. These have been shipped at very low volumes. CPO introduces many new manufacturing processes and significant manufacturability challenges. Understandably, given the immaturity of the supply chain and lack of data on reliability, customers are also reluctant to take the plunge in adopting the technology.

pro.text: 共封装光学（CPO）目前尚未达到可支持大规模采用的制造量。博通是唯一已出货采用CPO生产系统的厂商，其Bailly和Humboldt交换机出货量都极低，但现在英伟达也加入战局。CPO引入了许多新的制造工艺，也带来了显著的可制造性挑战。由于供应链尚不成熟且缺乏可靠性数据，客户也因此不愿贸然采用这项技术。

issues.description: 关键事实完全错译：原文明确表示Broadcom是唯一出货CPO生产系统的厂商，而译文误将主语改为英伟达
首次出现CPO时未按要求同时提供英文全称和中文解释
翻译腔明显且程度词调整不当，“take the plunge”被译为“果断采用”后又接“持谨慎态度”，逻辑矛盾
Scale-up networking 翻译为“纵向扩展网络”与术语表中“Scale-up → 纵向扩展”不完全一致，且上下文应保持为“纵向扩展”
句子结构生硬且有明显翻译腔，“正是正在”重复且awkward
“获得市场 traction”混用英文，显得不够中文化
列表项翻译可更精确和自然，“Host and Optical Engine packaging”中的Optical Engine应使用术语表中的“光引擎（OE）”

paragraphs.source: For CPO to gain traction, an industry leader must invest in shipping these products, driving the supply chain to develop scalable manufacturing and testing processes. Nvidia is the one taking the plunge and their intention is to get the supply chain ready, identify and work out the issues, and prepare datacenter operators for what we think will be the ‘killer’ application: Scale-up networking. There are a few key components and considerations to focus on regarding CPO, all of which have implications on performance and manufacturability. These are:

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

要让共封装光学（CPO）真正站稳脚跟，行业领军者必须投身出货这些产品，驱动供应链打造可规模化的制造与测试流程。英伟达正是率先入局的企业，其目标是让供应链准备就绪、发现并解决各类问题，并为数据中心运营商做好准备，以迎接我们认为将成为“杀手级”应用的纵向扩展（Scale-up）网络。关于CPO，有几个关键组件和考量因素需要重点关注，它们都对性能和可制造性产生重要影响。这些因素包括：

issues.description: 关键事实完全错译：原文明确表示Broadcom是唯一出货CPO生产系统的厂商，而译文误将主语改为英伟达
首次出现CPO时未按要求同时提供英文全称和中文解释
翻译腔明显且程度词调整不当，“take the plunge”被译为“果断采用”后又接“持谨慎态度”，逻辑矛盾
Scale-up networking 翻译为“纵向扩展网络”与术语表中“Scale-up → 纵向扩展”不完全一致，且上下文应保持为“纵向扩展”
句子结构生硬且有明显翻译腔，“正是正在”重复且awkward
“获得市场 traction”混用英文，显得不够中文化
列表项翻译可更精确和自然，“Host and Optical Engine packaging”中的Optical Engine应使用术语表中的“光引擎（OE）”

paragraphs.source: 1. Host and Optical Engine packaging 2. Fibers and Fiber coupling 3. Laser Sources and Wavelength Multiplexing 4. Modulator Type
